message:
feat(fcp-sdk): connector app contract module with builder API and golden vectors

Adds crates/fcp-sdk/src/contract.rs, an execution-form-neutral connector
application contract that lets connector authors declare which execution
surfaces (native, WASI, remote) their application supports. The contract
provides a fluent builder API on ConnectorAppDescriptor with helpers like
supports_usage_snapshots(), publishes_operation_receipts(),
supports_self_check(), with_fixture_scenario(), and
with_local_repro_command() that replace the previous manual struct
construction of BudgetSurface, EvidenceSurface, and DiagnosticsSurface.

async-trait was promoted from dev-dependency to regular dependency and
is now re-exported directly from the SDK crate root as
fcp_sdk::async_trait, replacing the prior re-export from fcp-kernel.
Doc examples updated to use the new builder pattern.

Golden vector tests added for connector_author_diagnostics_defaults,
connector_app_descriptor_defaults, and a fully-decorated descriptor
with all builder helpers applied.

- contract.rs: ConnectorApp trait, ConnectorAppDescriptor builder,
  InvokeSurface, StreamingSurface, BudgetSurface, EvidenceSurface,
  DiagnosticsSurface, ConnectorAppContract
- sdk_trait_tests.rs: MinimalConnector updated to use builder API,
  added assertions for new testkit entry points
- connector_app_contracts.json: 3 golden vectors for contract serde

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -143,24 +143,13 @@ impl ConnectorApp for MinimalConnector {
             .with_execution_form(ConnectorRuntimeFormat::Native)
             .with_archetype(ConnectorArchetype::Operational)
             .with_state_model(ConnectorStateModel::Stateless)
-            .with_budget(BudgetSurface {
-                declares_rate_limits: false,
-                supports_usage_snapshots: true,
-                supports_preflight_cost_estimates: true,
-            })
-            .with_evidence(EvidenceSurface {
-                trace_context: true,
-                decision_receipts: false,
-                operation_receipts: true,
-                audit_events: false,
-            })
-            .with_diagnostics(
-                DiagnosticsSurface::connector_author_defaults()
-                    .with_reason_code("self_check_unsupported")
-                    .with_fixture_scenario("minimal.happy_path")
-                    .with_local_repro_command(
-                        "cargo test -p fcp-sdk sdk_trait_tests::test_connector_app_contract -- --nocapture",
-                    ),
+            .supports_usage_snapshots()
+            .supports_preflight_cost_estimates()
+            .publishes_operation_receipts()
+            .with_diagnostic_reason_code("self_check_unsupported")
+            .with_fixture_scenario("minimal.happy_path")
+            .with_local_repro_command(
+                "cargo test -p fcp-sdk sdk_trait_tests::test_connector_app_contract -- --nocapture",
             )
     }
 
@@ -564,6 +553,20 @@ fn test_connector_app_contract() {
             .testkit_entry_points
             .contains(&"fcp_testkit::ConnectorTestHarness".to_string())
     );
+    assert!(
+        contract
+            .description
+            .diagnostics
+            .testkit_entry_points
+            .contains(&"fcp_testkit::evidence_helpers::EvidenceCollector".to_string())
+    );
+    assert!(
+        contract
+            .description
+            .diagnostics
+            .testkit_entry_points
+            .contains(&"fcp_testkit::session_script::SessionScript".to_string())
+    );
     assert_eq!(contract.capabilities.operations.len(), 1);
     assert_eq!(
         contract.capabilities.required_capabilities,

@@ -0,0 +1,138 @@

+        "invoke": {

+            "fcp_testkit::AsyncTestContext",
+            "fcp_testkit::ConnectorTestHarness",
+            "fcp_testkit::HttpFixtureServer",
+            "fcp_testkit::streaming_fixture::StreamingFixtureServer",
+            "fcp_testkit::evidence_helpers::EvidenceCollector",

+        "execution_forms": [
+          "native"
+        ],
+        "archetypes": [
+          "streaming"
+        ],
+        "state_model": {
+          "type": "singleton_writer"
+        },
+        "invoke": {
+          "supports_simulate": true,
+          "supports_idempotency_keys": true,
+          "supports_correlation": true,
+          "supports_provenance": true
+        },
+        "streaming": {
+          "supports_subscribe": true,
+          "supports_replay": true,
+          "supports_acknowledgement": true,
+          "supports_resume_tokens": true,

+        },
+        "drain": {

+        "budget": {
